hero.question: Will Finland win Eurovision 2026?
hero.prob_take: Finland at 36% implies roughly 2-to-1 odds against, which prices them as a legitimate contender but not a favorite, reflecting their recent competitive track record and solid songwriting tradition. The real tell is that $1.9M in volume moved this up 3.4 points in 24 hours, suggesting smart money thinks the market underweights their chances relative to how weak the broader 2026 field looks right now.

daily_take.headline: Finland's Eurovision Dark Horse Suddenly Looks Too Cheap at 36%
daily_take.deck: Finland jumped 3.4 points overnight on $1.9M volume, signaling real money betting the Nordic country finally breaks its Eurovision curse. The market's pricing in historical underperformance, not current momentum. Finnish entry quality has genuinely improved, contest voting has gotten less predictable, and 36% undervalues a top-5 finalist that could realistically win. Fade the pessimism and take the plus money.
